# Beudox HR Portal - Technical Context

## Architecture Overview

This is a modern React-based frontend application built with TypeScript, using Vite as the build tool and Supabase as the backend-as-a-service platform. The application follows a component-based architecture with custom hooks for state management and data fetching.

### Key Architectural Decisions

- **Component Structure**: Organized by feature domains (attendance, leave, payroll, etc.) with shared UI components in a separate directory
- **Routing**: Custom routing system mimicking Next.js Pages Router structure in `src/pages/`
- **State Management**: React hooks and context for local state, Supabase real-time subscriptions for server state
- **Styling**: Utility-first CSS with Tailwind CSS and custom CSS variables for design system consistency
- **Data Layer**: Direct Supabase client integration with TypeScript-generated types

## Core Technologies & Frameworks

- **React 18**: Component-based UI with hooks and concurrent features
- **TypeScript**: Type-safe development with strict mode enabled
- **Vite**: Fast development server and optimized production builds
- **Supabase**: PostgreSQL database, authentication, real-time subscriptions, and edge functions
- **Tailwind CSS**: Utility-first styling with custom design tokens
- **shadcn/ui**: Accessible, customizable UI component library
- **React Router**: Client-side routing with protected routes
- **React Hook Form**: Form state management and validation
- **Lucide React**: Consistent icon library

## Application Structure

### Entry Points
- `src/main.tsx`: Application bootstrap with React 18 createRoot
- `src/pages/Index.tsx`: Main dashboard/home page
- `src/App.tsx`: Root component with routing setup

### Key Directories

#### Components (`src/components/`)
- **ui/**: Base UI components from shadcn/ui (buttons, forms, dialogs, etc.)
- **layout/**: Application layout components (AppLayout, AppSidebar, TopBar, UserMenu)
- **attendance/**: Attendance tracking components (AttendanceSummary, AttendanceUploadFlow)
- **leave/**: Leave management (ApplyLeaveModal, LeaveBalancesTab, MyRequestsTab)
- **payroll/**: Payroll components (PayrollDetailSheet, PayrollSummary)
- **employee-profile/**: Employee profile tabs (AttendanceTab, LeaveTab, PayrollTab, etc.)
- **evaluations/**: Performance evaluation components (EvaluationTimeline)
- **finance/**: Financial components (FinanceSummary)
- **hr-policies/**: Policy management (RichTextEditor)
- **projects/**: Project management (ManageTeamModal, ProjectActivityLog)
- **settings/**: Admin settings (CompanyTab, DepartmentsTab, RolesTab, etc.)
- **profile/**: User profile components (NotificationPreferencesTab)

#### Pages (`src/pages/`)
- `Index.tsx`: Main dashboard
- `JobDescriptionDetail.tsx`: Job description viewing
- `JobDescriptionForm.tsx`: Job description editing
- `JobDescriptions.tsx`: Job descriptions list

#### Libraries (`src/lib/`)
- **utils.ts**: General utility functions (cn for className merging)
- **role-access.ts**: Role-based access control functions
- **attendance-format.ts**: Attendance data formatting utilities
- **leave-utils.ts**: Leave balance and calculation utilities
- **review-schedule.ts**: Performance review scheduling logic
- **client-activity.ts**: Activity logging and categorization
- **notifications.ts**: Notification sending utilities
- **login-tracking.ts**: User login tracking and device detection

#### Hooks (`src/hooks/`)
- **useAuth.ts**: Authentication state management
- **use-toast.ts**: Toast notification system
- **useSort.ts**: Table sorting functionality

#### Integrations (`src/integrations/`)
- **supabase/**: Supabase client configuration and TypeScript types

## Business Logic & Data Flow

### Authentication Flow
1. User logs in via Supabase Auth
2. JWT token stored automatically by Supabase client
3. `useAuth` hook fetches employee profile and permissions
4. Mandatory password change modal shown for temp passwords
5. Role-based navigation and feature access enforced

### Attendance Management
- **Data Collection**: Attendance records stored with timestamps, working hours, OT hours
- **Calculations**: Automatic working hours calculation, late detection, weekend/holiday OT
- **Analytics**: Monthly summaries, attendance rates, anomaly detection
- **Import/Export**: CSV upload functionality for bulk attendance data

### Leave Management
- **Balance Tracking**: Automatic leave balance updates based on leave types
- **Approval Workflow**: Multi-level approval process with notifications
- **Calendar Integration**: Leave calendar with conflict detection
- **Sync with Attendance**: Automatic attendance record creation for approved leaves

### Payroll Processing
- **Salary Calculation**: Base salary + allowances + overtime calculations
- **Tax & Deductions**: Automated payroll processing with tax calculations
- **PDF Generation**: Invoice/Payslip generation using edge functions
- **Approval Workflow**: Payroll approval before final processing

### Performance Reviews
- **Schedule Management**: Automated review scheduling based on employee join dates
- **Evaluation Forms**: Structured evaluation criteria with ratings
- **Salary Reviews**: Performance-based salary increment proposals
- **Timeline Tracking**: Review history and upcoming review alerts

## Database Schema (Supabase)

### Core Tables
- **employees**: Employee profiles, roles, departments, salary info
- **attendance_records**: Daily attendance with timestamps and calculations
- **leave_requests**: Leave applications with approval status
- **leave_balances**: Employee leave entitlements by type
- **payroll_records**: Processed payroll data
- **evaluations**: Performance review records
- **projects**: Project definitions and assignments
- **departments**: Organizational structure
- **roles**: Permission definitions
- **public_holidays**: Company holiday calendar

### Key Relationships
- Employees belong to departments and have roles
- Attendance records link to employees and dates
- Leave requests reference employees and leave types
- Payroll records calculated from attendance and employee salary data
- Evaluations linked to employees with review schedules

## Security & Permissions

### Role-Based Access Control
- **Admin**: Full system access, user management, settings
- **Manager**: Team management, approvals, reporting
- **Employee**: Self-service features, requests, profile management
- **HR**: HR-specific features, employee data access

### Data Security
- Row Level Security (RLS) policies on all Supabase tables
- JWT-based API authentication
- Secure password policies with mandatory changes
- Audit logging for sensitive operations

## Development Workflow

### Code Quality
- ESLint configuration for code consistency
- TypeScript strict mode for type safety
- Prettier for code formatting
- Husky pre-commit hooks for quality checks

### Testing Strategy
- Unit tests for utility functions and hooks
- Component testing with React Testing Library
- E2E testing with Playwright
- CI/CD pipeline with automated testing

### Deployment
- Built with Vite for optimized production bundles
- Static hosting compatible (Vercel, Netlify, etc.)
- Environment-based configuration
- Database migrations applied automatically

## Performance Considerations

- **Lazy Loading**: Route-based code splitting
- **Memoization**: React.memo and useMemo for expensive calculations
- **Database Optimization**: Indexed queries, efficient data fetching
- **Real-time Updates**: Supabase subscriptions for live data
- **Caching**: Browser caching for static assets

## Integration Points

- **Supabase Edge Functions**: Serverless functions for complex calculations (payroll, PDF generation)
- **Email Service**: Automated notifications via Supabase
- **File Storage**: Document uploads and avatar storage
- **Real-time Features**: Live notifications and collaborative features

This technical context provides a comprehensive overview for understanding the codebase architecture, business logic, and development patterns used in the Beudox HR Portal application.
